summary: Both REQ-19 and REQ-20 appear to be implemented in the diff. The backend WhatsApp link is updated to 'https://wa.me/918918832546' in both the migration file and main.mo. The frontend components (WhatsAppButton, HeroSection, QuoteSection via backend fetch) use this link. The Navigation component now features an inline SVG gold 'SS' monogram with gradient, brand text, and a working hamburger menu. No significant missing requirements or hallucinated features were identified.
